历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 8710 → 9829 → 10060 → 11707 → 10797, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2087 places in the past 4 years; in 2025, it moved forward by 910 places compared to 2024, indicating a recovery signal, with a baseline ranking of about 10797; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 51 in 2021 → 43 in 2022 → 45 in 2023 → 43 in 2024 → 42 in 2025, showing a slight reduction trend; the 2026 plan is 50, an increase of 8 students (+19.0%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; Soft Science main ranking: 2021 43rd → 2022 46th → 2023 48th → 2024 56th → 2025 61st → 2026 60th, with rankings declining in recent years then stabilizing, overall at the top 60 level nationally; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'significantly negative', involving 7 incidents (6 negative, 1 neutral) including academic misconduct (dean's paper fraud leading to dismissal), which may suppress application enthusiasm; Douyin popularity ranking 48th 'relatively hot', short video exposure average; no historical enrollment anomaly signals of Shanghai University; Sociology A, World History A-, with 2 A- or above disciplines; although not directly covered by discipline evaluation for Physics Category majors (Electrical, Electronic Information, Science Experimental Class, Economics, etc.), the university's comprehensive strength still attracts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication was highly recommended in 2024, Electrical Engineering highly recommended (74.28), Computer Science recommended (67.8), all core enrollment categories for Shanghai University's Physics Category, with high social popularity; Hunan Province Physics Category candidates: 205,920 in 2021 → 320,192 in 2025 → 347,000 in 2026, continuously increasing, with 2026 up about 8.4% from 2025, intensifying competition; Shanghai University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal; the university enrolled 57 students from Hunan in 2021 (2.06% of national total), 45 in 2025 (2.76%), with a slight increase in Hunan student proportion but absolute numbers remain small.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the recovery signal in 2025 rankings, the alleviation effect of a 19% enrollment expansion in 2026, intensified competition from continuous candidate growth, potential suppression of enthusiasm due to negative reputation events, and high social popularity of hot majors like Electronic Information/Electrical, the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is expected to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 10,797; predicted minimum ranking approximately 12,061, with a range of 11,561–12,561.

- Electronic Information (Artificial Intelligence and New Generation Electronic Information).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Management Science and Engineering (enrolled in 2023).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If ranking is within the predicted range of 11,561–12,561, it is recommended to primarily fill Tier 2 Electrical and Science Experimental Class, with Tier 1 Communication Engineering (Excellent Engineer Class) and Electronic Information as reach options; if ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (within 11,561), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if ranking is near the upper limit (around 12,561), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 2 as safety choices.

The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2178. 学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked 60th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a continuous decline in recent years that has stabilized, overall at the top 60 level nationally. 专业热度与地域.text: Popularity of humanities and social science majors is polarized, with Law being watched, Chinese Language/Literature recommended.
